The [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian]] '''GPT-117 Troop Transport''' was a [[Skiff/Legends|skiff]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] on [[Planet/Legends|planets]] such as [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]].

{{Veh-stub}}
